_meta.note: Authoritative IRIS toxicity values for the catalog's IRIS-labeled substances/inputs, derived from the EPA IRIS Chemicals_Details export. Used by iris-canonical.test.ts to assert catalog IRIS values match the EPA source (NOT AI-memorized canon). Regenerate from a fresh EPA IRIS export when IRIS updates. Value notation in EPA export: 'N x 10 M' = N*10^M (minus signs preserved). EXPANDED 2026-05-31 to the full master-list IRIS substance set (CAS-matched via CATALOG_SUBSTANCE_COVERAGE_MATRIX.csv); the original 16 in-repo substances' entries are preserved verbatim. EXPANDED 2026-06-02 with IRIS new-input + ambiguous orphan anchors (new-input + existing-substance attaches) from the EPA Chemicals_Details export; values rounded to EPA precision. EXPANDED 2026-06-02 (pass d0c00016, new-substance): +134 EPA IRIS orphan anchors from the EPA Chemicals_Details export (values rounded to EPA precision).
